Container.Name: Kometa Asset Manager
Container.Overview: KAM moves uploaded posters/backgrounds into Kometa asset folders and provides an in-app settings UI.

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: Container 8000 -> Host port for the web UI

Config.Name: Assets Root
Config.Description: Root folder that contains Movies/TV/Collections subfolders

Config.Name: KAM Assets Root
Config.Description: Container path KAM uses for the mounted assets root. Leave as /assets unless you change the Assets Root container path.

Config.Name: Collections Root
Config.Description: Container path for shared Kometa collection artwork folders

Config.Name: Config Folder
Config.Description: Location to persist the KAM database and settings

Config.Name: Plex Verify SSL
Config.Description: Set to false only when Plex uses a self-signed HTTPS certificate

Config.Name: Auth Mode
Config.Description: Optional auth override. Leave blank to use the Settings UI, or set builtin/reverse_proxy.

Config.Name: Auth Password
Config.Description: Optional built-in auth password override. Leave blank to use the Settings UI.

Config.Name: Secure Auth Cookie
Config.Description: Use auto for normal behavior, true for forced HTTPS-only cookies, or false for direct HTTP.
